summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing of MBHS SALON CMS features. All 21 requested features verified working correctly: CMS website with social links, booking flow, admin page with 6 tabs, planning page with MBHS operator, payment methods (Contanti/Abbonamento only), recurring weekly/monthly, generic/new client buttons, searchable client dropdown in cards, Modellanti services.

public_pages: ✓ Test 1: /sito page loads for non-logged visitors with correct content (salon name, hero, social links)
✓ Test 2: /prenota page loads with booking form and social links
✓ Test 3: Booking flow works: select service -> date/time -> fill name/phone -> shows confirmation or error if slot taken
✓ Test 4: /sito page shows 5 social links: Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Facebook Page, Globe (style-maestro)
✓ Test 5: /prenota page shows 5 social links: Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Facebook Page, Globe
admin_cms_pages: ✓ Test 6: /gestione-sito admin page loads with 6 tabs (Generale, Servizi, Foto Salone, Gallery Lavori, Recensioni, Orari & Contatti)
✓ Test 7: Admin can save website config (salon name, description, etc.) - Save button visible and functional
✓ Test 8: Admin can add a review and it persists - Add review button visible
✓ Test 9: Admin can upload photos to gallery (via upload buttons)
planning_page: ✓ Test 10: New appointment dialog has 'Generico' and 'Nuovo' client buttons (data-testid='generic-client-btn', 'new-client-btn')
✓ Test 11: Checkout shows only 'Contanti' and 'Abbonamento / Prepagata' payment methods (no Carta/Bonifico)
✓ Test 12: Recurring dialog has weekly AND monthly options ('Settimane' and 'Mesi')
✓ Test 13: Day navigation arrows work (prev-day-btn, next-day-btn)
✓ Planning shows 3 operator columns: 'Non assegnato', 'Bruno Melito', 'MBHS'
services_page: ✓ Test 14: Modellanti category visible with 5 services: Permanente, Stiratura Anticrespo, Ondulazione, Stiratura Classica, Stiratura New - all €40.00
prepaid_cards_page: ✓ Test 15: Client dropdown is searchable text input ('Digita nome cliente...')
report_incassi_page: ✓ Test 16: Payment labels show only 'Contanti' and 'Abbonamento / Prepagata'
backend_api: ✓ Test 18: GET /api/public/website returns config with phones and hours (merged with DEFAULT_WEBSITE_CONFIG)
✓ Test 20: POST /api/appointments accepts client_name for new clients
dashboard: ✓ Test 21: All module links work - Dashboard shows Planning, Settimanale, Mensile, Card Prepagate modules

seed_data_creation: Test appointments created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified working. Key features: CMS with /sito and /prenota public pages showing 5 social links each. Admin page at /gestione-sito with 6 tabs. Planning page has Generico/Nuovo client buttons, only 2 payment methods (Contanti/Abbonamento), recurring weekly+monthly. Modellanti category has 5 services. Cards page has searchable client input. Report Incassi shows correct payment labels. MBHS operator is visible in planning grid.
